label: Intraday Momentum
description: Intraday momentum based on checkpoint breaks (every 30 minutes from 10:00 to 15:30 ET) against a rolling volatility-scaled noise band around the day's open/prior-close reference range. A break above the upper band signals long, a break below the lower band signals short; positions trail a VWAP/band-based stop and can reverse intraday. Exit at EOD (15:55 ET) if still open.
reference: Zarattini, Barbon & Aziz (2024), 'Beat the Market: An Effective Intraday Momentum Strategy' (paper in reference/)
